---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for VirSift
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Feature summary

Describe the proposed capability.

## Surveillance or research use case

What workflow, dataset, or decision would this feature support?

## Current limitation

What is difficult or impossible with the current version?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how the feature should work from the user's perspective.

## Scientific and data considerations

Note any implications for reproducibility, metadata interpretation, privacy,
restricted data, sampling, filtering, or export.

## Possible implementation

Share implementation ideas, interface sketches, or references when available.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches.
